gpu: AMD Radeon RX 580 (radeonsi, polaris10, LLVM 17.0.6, DRM 3.57, 6.8.6-200.fc39.x86_64)
notes:
Tryp wouldn't detect my radio (Radiomaster Boxer), or a normal gamepad controller (8BitDo Pro 2). I tried every USB Joystick mode and interface on the radio, and I tried the controller with Steam Input both on and off, it made no difference. Since a controller of some sort is required to fly if it can't detect a controller it's unplayable.

The Radiomaster Boxer works with every other FPV Simulator on Steam that I've tried: LiftOff, LiftOff: Micro Drones, FPV.SkyDive & FPV Logic, and Velocidrone too (outside of Steam).  All of them detect it as a Boxer and Just Work, but not Tryp.
